name: Milk (Cow) (food medium)
description: Food-derived medium: metabolizable components of Milk (Cow) [Milk and milk products] from FooDB, plus a standard M9 mineral base. Organic components use presence-based uptake bounds; FooDB content values are retained per component for custom scaling.

provenance.notes: Organic components mapped from FooDB compounds to BiGG via InChIKey/name (see mapping_confidence). Mineral base added for growth capability. Bounds are presence-based; foodb_content/foodb_unit retained.
